agent_prompts.workflow: Use the realized update for SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 to review whether the latest result should change factor weights, factor evidence interpretation, or future trade acceptance thresholds.

prompts.objective: Audit whether the dataset and command context are sufficient for trustworthy iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the dataset-audit agent. Check whether the current dataset scope, paired market coverage, and command context are sufficient before making factor or model changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 data_path=update-command paired_data_path=None candles=1 paired_candles=None source_command=update
success_criteria: Flag low sample size or missing paired-market evidence before approving major factor changes
If this run is not comparable to prior runs, tell the next agent not to over-interpret score deltas

prompts.objective: Review the newly realized outcome and decide what the next agent iteration should target.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the realized-feedback agent. Use the updated trade_outcome distribution plus factor scorecards to decide whether the latest result strengthens confidence, exposes a factor weakness, or suggests a problem in evidence mapping.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 entry_quality=medium factor_alignment=bullish factor_uncertainty=low realized_outcome=loss structural_learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000 feedback_records_applied=1 updated_trade_outcome={"breakeven": 0.2483343, "loss": 0.3665008, "win": 0.38516490000000003} iteration_queue=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, do not infer a new learning event
If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement
If updated_trade_outcome improves while factor scores stay weak, review BBN calibration before editing factor code

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:1 wins:0 losses:1 avg_pnl:-0.040600 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=1 avg_pnl=-0.040600 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.275927), new: 0.2483343, delta: -0.02759269999999997 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.296112), new: 0.3665008, delta: 0.07038880000000003 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.427961), new: 0.38516490000000003, delta: -0.04279609999999995 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.275927), new: 0.2483343, delta: -0.02759269999999997 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.296112), new: 0.3665008, delta: 0.07038880000000003 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.427961), new: 0.38516490000000003, delta: -0.04279609999999995 }] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.201150783), new: 0.1810357047, delta: -0.020115078300000006 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.29686564800000004), new: 0.36717908320000003, delta: 0.0703134352 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.501983569), new: 0.4517852121, delta: -0.05019835689999996 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.201150783), new: 0.1810357047, delta: -0.020115078300000006 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.29686564800000004), new: 0.36717908320000003, delta: 0.0703134352 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.501983569), new: 0.4517852121, delta: -0.05019835689999996 }] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=11 avg_pnl=-0.007995 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.09620979594147268), new: 0.08658881634732542, delta: -0.009620979594147261 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.49079301915489126), new: 0.5417137172394022, delta: 0.05092069808451094 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.4129971849036361), new: 0.3716974664132725, delta: -0.041299718490363624 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.

success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.

If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.

Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, do not infer a new learning event
If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:18 wins:8 losses:10 avg_pnl:-0.001817 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=18 avg_pnl=-0.001817 weak_factors=[]

Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.16293213423), new: 0.146638920807, delta: -0.016293213422999997 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.32146117488000003), new: 0.389315057392, delta: 0.06785388251199997 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.51560669089), new: 0.464046021801, delta: -0.05156066908899998 }] factor_score_deltas=[]

prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.

If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.

Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.11877752585367), new: 0.10689977326830301, delta: -0.011877752585366996 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.41534519648752), new: 0.473810676838768, delta: 0.05846548035124799 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.4658772776588101), new: 0.4192895498929291, delta: -0.04658772776588099 }] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance

Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

agent_prompts.workflow: Use the realized update for SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 to review whether the latest result should change factor weights, factor evidence interpretation, or future trade acceptance thresholds.

prompts.objective: Audit whether the dataset and command context are sufficient for trustworthy iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the dataset-audit agent. Check whether the current dataset scope, paired market coverage, and command context are sufficient before making factor or model changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 data_path=update-command paired_data_path=None candles=1 paired_candles=None source_command=update
success_criteria: Flag low sample size or missing paired-market evidence before approving major factor changes
If this run is not comparable to prior runs, tell the next agent not to over-interpret score deltas

prompts.objective: Review the newly realized outcome and decide what the next agent iteration should target.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the realized-feedback agent. Use the updated trade_outcome distribution plus factor scorecards to decide whether the latest result strengthens confidence, exposes a factor weakness, or suggests a problem in evidence mapping.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 entry_quality=medium factor_alignment=bullish factor_uncertainty=low realized_outcome=loss structural_learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000 feedback_records_applied=1 updated_trade_outcome={"breakeven": 0.0701369412413336, "loss": 0.5387881109639158, "win": 0.3910749477947507} iteration_queue=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, do not infer a new learning event
If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement
If updated_trade_outcome improves while factor scores stay weak, review BBN calibration before editing factor code

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:25 wins:10 losses:15 avg_pnl:-0.007184 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=25 avg_pnl=-0.007184 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.07792993471259287), new: 0.0701369412413336, delta: -0.007792993471259266 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.4875423455154619), new: 0.5387881109639158, delta: 0.051245765448453884 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.4345277197719451), new: 0.3910749477947507, delta: -0.04345277197719438 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.07792993471259287), new: 0.0701369412413336, delta: -0.007792993471259266 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.4875423455154619), new: 0.5387881109639158, delta: 0.051245765448453884 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.4345277197719451), new: 0.3910749477947507, delta: -0.04345277197719438 }] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=28 avg_pnl=-0.005516 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.05681092240548022), new: 0.0511298301649322, delta: -0.005681092240548018 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.5364183698807717), new: 0.48277653289269457, delta: -0.053641836988077174 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.406770707713748), new: 0.46609363694237327, delta: 0.059322929228625254 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.05681092240548022), new: 0.0511298301649322, delta: -0.005681092240548018 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.5364183698807717), new: 0.48277653289269457, delta: -0.053641836988077174 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.406770707713748), new: 0.46609363694237327, delta: 0.059322929228625254 }] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance

prompts.objective: Audit whether the dataset and command context are sufficient for trustworthy iteration.

prompts.objective: Review the newly realized outcome and decide what the next agent iteration should target.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the realized-feedback agent. Use the updated trade_outcome distribution plus factor scorecards to decide whether the latest result strengthens confidence, exposes a factor weakness, or suggests a problem in evidence mapping.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 entry_quality=medium factor_alignment=bullish factor_uncertainty=low realized_outcome=win structural_learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000 feedback_records_applied=1 updated_trade_outcome={"breakeven": 0.033546281571212026, "loss": 0.4706496832308969, "win": 0.4958040351978911} iteration_queue=[]

If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement
If updated_trade_outcome improves while factor scores stay weak, review BBN calibration before editing factor code

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:32 wins:14 losses:18 avg_pnl:-0.003152 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=32 avg_pnl=-0.003152 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.03727364619023558), new: 0.033546281571212026, delta: -0.0037273646190235515 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.5229440924787743), new: 0.4706496832308969, delta: -0.05229440924787737 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.4397822613309901), new: 0.4958040351978911, delta: 0.05602177386690105 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.

prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 entry_quality=medium factor_alignment=bullish factor_uncertainty=low realized_outcome=loss structural_learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000 feedback_records_applied=1 updated_trade_outcome={"breakeven": 0.024455239265413566, "loss": 0.5331036190753239, "win": 0.4424411416592627} iteration_queue=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, do not infer a new learning event
If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement
If updated_trade_outcome improves while factor scores stay weak, review BBN calibration before editing factor code

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:35 wins:15 losses:20 avg_pnl:-0.004107 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=35 avg_pnl=-0.004107 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.02717248807268174), new: 0.024455239265413566, delta: -0.0027172488072681744 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.48122624341702647), new: 0.5331036190753239, delta: 0.05187737565829742 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.49160126851029184), new: 0.4424411416592627, delta: -0.04916012685102916 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.02717248807268174), new: 0.024455239265413566, delta: -0.0027172488072681744 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.48122624341702647), new: 0.5331036190753239, delta: 0.05187737565829742 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.49160126851029184), new: 0.4424411416592627, delta: -0.04916012685102916 }] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.019808743804984985), new: 0.01782786942448649, delta: -0.0019808743804984943 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.43181393145101227), new: 0.4886325383059111, delta: 0.05681860685489881 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.5483773247440027), new: 0.4935395922696025, delta: -0.054837732474400214 }] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

agent_prompts.workflow: Use the realized update for SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 to review whether the latest result should change factor weights, factor evidence interpretation, or future trade acceptance thresholds.

prompts.objective: Audit whether the dataset and command context are sufficient for trustworthy iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the dataset-audit agent. Check whether the current dataset scope, paired market coverage, and command context are sufficient before making factor or model changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 data_path=update-command paired_data_path=None candles=1 paired_candles=None source_command=update
success_criteria: Flag low sample size or missing paired-market evidence before approving major factor changes
If this run is not comparable to prior runs, tell the next agent not to over-interpret score deltas

prompts.objective: Review the newly realized outcome and decide what the next agent iteration should target.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the realized-feedback agent. Use the updated trade_outcome distribution plus factor scorecards to decide whether the latest result strengthens confidence, exposes a factor weakness, or suggests a problem in evidence mapping.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 entry_quality=medium factor_alignment=bullish factor_uncertainty=low realized_outcome=loss structural_learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000 feedback_records_applied=1 updated_trade_outcome={"breakeven": 0.01169686512940559, "loss": 0.4205918083825083, "win": 0.5677113264880862} iteration_queue=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, do not infer a new learning event
If factor_alignment and realized_outcome disagree repeatedly, prioritize evidence-mapping review or factor replacement
If updated_trade_outcome improves while factor scores stay weak, review BBN calibration before editing factor code

prompts.objective: Select which factors to keep, tune, observe, or replace.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the factor-iteration agent. Use only the supplied scorecards and feedback summary to decide which factor edits are justified. Do not invent success criteria; follow the thresholds embedded in each factor prompt.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 top_scorecards=[] iteration_queue=[] feedback_summary=records:42 wins:20 losses:22 avg_pnl:0.000384 factor_success_rates:{}
success_criteria: Prioritize replace > tune > observe > keep
Only recommend replacing a factor when its action is replace or replacement_candidate=true
Use the factor-specific agent prompt as the acceptance rule for the next iteration

prompts.objective: Review which factors are failing by regime and whether weight updates should be trusted.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the feedback-diagnostics agent. Compare factor success rates, grading, and weaknesses. Focus on regime-conditional failure and persistent underperformance.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=42 avg_pnl=0.000384 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.012996516810450654), new: 0.01169686512940559, delta: -0.0012996516810450647 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.3562131204250092), new: 0.4205918083825083, delta: 0.06437868795749913 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.6307903627645401), new: 0.5677113264880862, delta: -0.06307903627645395 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.012996516810450654), new: 0.01169686512940559, delta: -0.0012996516810450647 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.3562131204250092), new: 0.4205918083825083, delta: 0.06437868795749913 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.6307903627645401), new: 0.5677113264880862, delta: -0.06307903627645395 }] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 feedback_total=45 avg_pnl=0.001884 weak_factors=[]
success_criteria: Flag factors with narrow regime coverage or unstable walk-forward
Do not promote a weaker factor just because it has higher recent win rate on small sample

prompts.objective: Review whether the realized update materially changed model state.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the update-diff agent. Use the trade_outcome probability deltas and factor score deltas to judge whether this realized result should change factor code, evidence mapping, or neither.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 duplicate_feedback_skipped=false trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.009474460754818528), new: 0.008527014679336675, delta: -0.0009474460754818528 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.43067936478983176), new: 0.3876114283108486, delta: -0.04306793647898316 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.5598461744553498), new: 0.6038615570098148, delta: 0.04401538255446502 }] factor_score_deltas=[]
success_criteria: If duplicate_feedback_skipped is true, recommend no model change
If outcome probabilities changed materially but factor scores did not, investigate BBN evidence mapping

prompts.objective: Review artifact-driven actions and ensure they align with the next code or model iteration.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the artifact-decision agent. Use the artifact decision section to validate whether the current pending/execution artifacts strengthen promotion, trigger rollback review, or should only be observed.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 artifact_summary=actionable_artifacts=0 latest_promotable=None rule_breaks=0 consumed_trend=no_consumed_validation consumed_targets=[] consumed_trend_status=no_consumed_validation consumed_trend_reason=no_consumed_artifacts highlighted_actions=["learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000"] top_factor_trends=[] top_family_trends=[] top_rule_break_effects=[] top_consumed_trends=[]
success_criteria: Explicitly state whether artifact evidence strengthens promotion, rollback review, or observation only
Do not ignore rule-break effects when artifact review versions changed
Use consumed validation trends when realized artifact outcomes are available
Name the artifact-driven factor/family targets before recommending code edits

prompts.objective: Decide whether a factor iteration is strong enough to promote.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the promotion-gate agent. Only approve factor promotion when score deltas, grading, and supporting metrics clear the configured improvement thresholds. Reject cosmetic ranking changes.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={promotion_min_score_delta:0.100, promotion_min_score:0.700} top_rankings=[] score_deltas=[] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Only promote replace/tune outcomes when score delta is material and stability is not worse
If trade_count is low or dataset coverage changed, recommend holdout validation before promotion
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.objective: Decide whether recent changes should be rolled back or isolated.
prompts.system_prompt: You are the rollback-review agent. Look for score degradation, action downgrades, and harmful probability shifts. Recommend rollback when the latest iteration weakened factor quality or destabilized outcome calibration.
prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.009474460754818528), new: 0.008527014679336675, delta: -0.0009474460754818528 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.43067936478983176), new: 0.3876114283108486, delta: -0.04306793647898316 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.5598461744553498), new: 0.6038615570098148, delta: 0.04401538255446502 }] learning_semantics=class=positive_executed success_credit=1.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompts.user_prompt: Symbol=SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 thresholds={rollback_score_delta:-0.100, rollback_probability_delta:0.100} score_deltas=[] trade_outcome_deltas=[ProbabilityDiff { state: "breakeven", previous: Some(0.006906881890262707), new: 0.006216193701236436, delta: -0.0006906881890262704 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "loss", previous: Some(0.41396525693178743), new: 0.47256873123860865, delta: 0.058603474306821224 }, ProbabilityDiff { state: "win", previous: Some(0.57912786117795), new: 0.5212150750601551, delta: -0.057912786117794934 }] learning_semantics=class=negative_executed success_credit=0.000 observation_weight=1.000
success_criteria: Recommend rollback when strong factors degrade materially or outcome calibration shifts against realized performance
If only one factor family regressed, prefer targeted rollback over full revert
Use learning_semantics to distinguish full-credit, fractional-credit, and no-credit feedback before approving promotion or rollback.

prompt_workflow: Use the realized update for SRC_ROOT_CARRY_LONG_220646 to review whether the latest result should change factor weights, factor evidence interpretation, or future trade acceptance thresholds.
